generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our reliance on foreign tech puts national security at risk. The recent cyber attacks on our infrastructure prove we can't afford to wait. Strategic autonomy isn't just about independence - it's about protecting our families and communities. The cost of inaction is far greater than the investment in domestic solutions. #NationalSecurityFirst #MadeInAmerica
